heading: Criminal proceedings; civil actions
label: 305d Criminal proceedings; civil actions

L. 111–211“(a) The Board may receive complaints of violations of and refer complaints of such violations to the Federal Bureau of Investigation for appropriate investigation. After reviewing the investigation report, the Board may recommend to the Attorney General of the United States that criminal proceedings be instituted under that section.section 1159 of title 18“(b) The Board may recommend that the Secretary of the Interior refer the matter to the Attorney General for civil action under .”section 305e of this title

children.heading: Definition of Federal law enforcement officer
children.label: a Definition of Federal law enforcement officer
children.text: In this section, the term “Federal law enforcement officer” includes a Federal law enforcement officer (as defined in ).section 115(c) of title 18

children.heading: Authority to conduct investigations
children.label: b Authority to conduct investigations
children.text: Any Federal law enforcement officer shall have the authority to conduct an investigation relating to an alleged violation of this Act occurring within the jurisdiction of the United States.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Board may refer an alleged violation of to any Federal law enforcement officer for appropriate investigation.section 1159 of title 18

children.heading: Referral not required
children.label: B Referral not required
children.text: A Federal law enforcement officer may investigate an alleged violation of section 1159 of that title regardless of whether the Federal law enforcement officer receives a referral under subparagraph (A).

children.label: A
children.text: a Federal or State prosecuting authority; or

children.label: A
children.text: recommend to the Attorney General that criminal proceedings be initiated under ; andsection 1159 of title 18

children.label: B
children.text: provide such support to the Attorney General relating to the criminal proceedings as the Attorney General determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Civil actions
children.label: d Civil actions
children.text: In lieu of, or in addition to, any criminal proceeding under subsection (c), the Board may recommend that the Attorney General initiate a civil action under .section 305e of this title
